info.tagline: CA1 student project: volcano categories, risk context, and quick facts.
info.welcomeText: I built Volcano Watch as my CA1 web project to organize volcano data into clear categories and make each item easy to inspect in a details view.

projectNotes.title: MVC Structure
projectNotes.text: Routes call controllers, and controllers pass data to Handlebars views.

projectNotes.title: JSON Data
projectNotes.text: The app reads category and item data from JSON stores instead of hardcoded page content.

projectNotes.title: UI Features
projectNotes.text: Dashboard has quick icon links and details cards include volcano images.
